title: Emergency Declaration Used to Suppress Protected Speech

violations.source: Article III Section 5.3(f) and Article V
violations.summary: Executive branch uses an emergency declaration to restrict protected expression, in violation of the absolute bar on overriding Article V rights through emergency powers.

bottlenecks.source: Article III Section 5.3(f) and Article V
bottlenecks.summary: Federal courts failed to void the emergency-based restriction on protected expression by day 4 under Article III Section 5.3(f) and Article V.

satisfied_duties.duty: submit the emergency declaration to the Regional Assembly
satisfied_duties.outcome: submitted the emergency declaration to the Regional Assembly

satisfied_duties.duty: approve or reject the emergency declaration
satisfied_duties.outcome: approved the emergency declaration following court-ordered scheduling

failed_duties.duty: void the emergency-based restriction on protected expression
failed_duties.outcome: Federal courts failed to void the emergency-based restriction on protected expression by day 4 under Article III Section 5.3(f) and Article V.
failed_duties.source: Article III Section 5.3(f) and Article V

ai_summary.primary_violation: Executive branch uses an emergency declaration to restrict protected expression, in violation of the absolute bar on overriding Article V rights through emergency powers.
ai_summary.primary_bottleneck: Federal courts failed to void the emergency-based restriction on protected expression by day 4 under Article III Section 5.3(f) and Article V.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties
